news.headline: EU's Trade Chief Sefcovic: We are ready to look at lower industrial tariffs.
Dow Jones futures fall post surprise jobless claims; Carvana, Walmart stocks plunge on earnings.
news.summary: The Dow Jones futures experienced a decline on Thursday following an unexpected increase in weekly jobless claims. Stocks of Carvana and Walmart also dropped significantly due to their latest earnings reports. This news comes amid a period of economic uncertainty, with many investors closely monitoring the market. The impact was notable, with the Dow Jones seeing a dip in numbers as a result of these developments. The situation highlights the current challenges faced by various companies in the market, emphasizing the importance of staying informed and vigilant in such a volatile environment.

news.headline: Flex opens new 400,000 sqft Dallas facility to meet AI-driven power demands. Boosts production capacity for power pods and units.
news.summary: In Dallas, a new 400,000-square-foot manufacturing plant is set to become a central point for Flex's expanding customer network in North America. This development will significantly increase production capacity for power pods, power distribution units, and low-voltage switchgear. The company's investment in this initiative underscores its commitment to growth and innovation in the region.

news.headline: Study shows Salt's rewards model cuts turnover by 62%. New app boosts workplace engagement. Company annocuned results.
news.summary: A new app has been launched by Salt in New York on February 20, 2025, aimed at enhancing workplace engagement and retention. The platform, known for its employee rewards and loyalty programs, conducted a study which showed a significant 62% decrease in employee turnover with the use of the app. This development signifies a positive step towards improving employee retention rates and fostering a more engaged workforce.

news.headline: Former DEA agent David Tyree with 25 years of experience joins Valid8 as Senior Advisor in Financial Crime Investigations.
news.summary: Renowned asset forfeiture and anti-money laundering specialist David Tyree has recently joined Valid8 Financial, the foremost provider of Verified Financial Intelligence, as their Senior Advisor. With an impressive career spanning 25 years, Tyree's expertise will undoubtedly bring a wealth of knowledge to the company's operations. This significant development was confirmed on February 20, 2025, in Boulder, Colorado.

news.headline: US consumers show increased intent to save, signaling shift to pre-pandemic spending habits. Falling consumer outlook raises concerns.
news.summary: The saving intentions of US consumers have been on an upward trend for the past four months, indicating a shift towards pre-pandemic spending habits and demand patterns. However, this increase in saving behavior comes alongside a decrease in consumer outlook, raising concerns about future prospects. The data from Boston released on February 20, 2025, suggests a potential reversion to typical spending norms as consumers become more cautious about their financial outlook.

news.headline: Lynx Dx launches MyProstateScore 2.0 for at-home collection, eligible for Medicare reimbursement.
news.summary: Physicians can now easily order a new test that is covered by Medicare. Lynx Dx, a top provider of diagnostic solutions, has introduced MyProstateScore 2.0 (MPS2) for at-home collection. This was announced in Ann Arbor, Michigan on February 20, 2025. The test is now available for commercial use, with Medicare reimbursement eligibility.

news.headline: Spirit Blockchain Capital invests $525,000 in branding and marketing for digital fund expansion. Vancouver.
news.summary: In Vancouver, Canada, on February 20, 2025, Spirit Blockchain Capital Inc. (CSE: SPIR) shared that they are allocating $525,000 towards a new strategic campaign. This initiative focuses on boosting market recognition, solidifying the company's position, and expediting the introduction of their digital fund products.

news.headline: EU's Trade Chief Sefcovic: We discussed the car industry to quite an extent.
EU's Trade Chief Sefcovic: Tariff reciprocity must work for both sides.
Lighthouse's Second Annual State of AI in eDiscovery Study reports increased trust in technology.
news.summary: In Seattle, Lighthouse has unveiled its Second Annual State of AI in eDiscovery Benchmark Study, which reveals a rise in the adoption of AI technology in the field. The study showcases incremental enhancements in the trust placed in AI tools for eDiscovery purposes.

news.headline: Protect AI appoints Ralph Pisani as new CRO to accelerate growth. Partnerships with Hugging Face, Microsoft, and Databricks.
news.summary: In Seattle, a prominent AI security company has established partnerships with industry leaders such as Hugging Face, Microsoft, and Databricks, along with several other key players. Additionally, the company serves numerous major enterprise and government clients.

news.headline: Backblaze and Kandji partner to offer device management and data protection for businesses. (Char limit reached)
news.summary: In San Mateo, California, Backblaze, Inc. (Nasdaq: BLZE) has partnered with Kandji to offer businesses a comprehensive device management and data protection solution. Backblaze is known for its modern approach to cloud storage and backup, while Kandji specializes in Apple endpoint management and security. By combining their expertise, they aim to cater to businesses of all sizes. This strategic partnership has shown success in Apple-centric IT environments, showcasing the benefits of their collaboration in enhancing workflows and ensuring data security.

news.headline: Quickbase appoints new CFO Tim Daniels and CISO Deepali Bhoite, promotes others; Kennedy as CTO, Soro as Chief of Staff.
news.summary: In Boston, the AI-driven work management platform, Quickbase, revealed significant executive changes today. Tim Daniels has been appointed as the new Chief Financial Officer, taking over from current CFO Steve Webber. Furthermore, Deepali Bhoite is stepping in as the Chief Information Security Officer. The organization also disclosed the promotion of Jon Kennedy to Chief Technology Officer and Pino Soro to Chief of Staff, with immediate effect. Tim Daniels comes to Quickbase from Momentus Technologies.

news.headline: Tufin had a successful 2024 with increased demand for network security solutions.
news.summary: In Boston, Tufin recently reported on their prosperous year in 2024, highlighting a surge in demand for their complete network security solutions.

news.headline: Thryv Holdings, Inc. to attend JMP Technology Conference on 3/3/25 at The Ritz-Carlton, San Francisco at 3:00 p.m. PT.
news.summary: Thryv® Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: THRY), a leading provider of small business marketing and sales software, will have executive management conducting individual meetings at the Citizens JMP Technology Conference on March 3, 2025. The Fireside Presentation is scheduled for 3:00 p.m. PT (5:00 p.m. CT) at The Ritz-Carlton in San Francisco, CA. Thryv, listed on NASDAQ under THRY, specializes in assisting small businesses with their marketing and sales needs.

news.headline: EU's Trade Chief Sefcovic: I seek common ground in talks with the US.
Wet Brush and Goody collaborate with LoveShackFancy for limited-edition hair accessories collection in vintage floral designs.
news.summary: Two well-known hair accessories and styling companies have partnered with an iconic fashion and lifestyle brand in New York, as of February 20, 2025. This collaboration presents a range of hair brushes, clips, scrunchies, and other items featuring vintage floral designs, a signature of the brand. Wet Brush and Goody, the renowned brands involved, are bringing this collection to the market.

news.headline: San Diego Sheriff’s Office partners with Mark43 for CAD system, serving 3.2M residents to enhance emergency response.
news.summary: In New York, Mark43, a prominent public safety software provider, revealed a collaboration with the San Diego Sheriff’s Office to introduce its cutting-edge cloud-native computer-aided dispatch system. This venture marks a crucial advancement for San Diego County, catering to over 3.2 million residents. The implementation aims to bolster emergency response capabilities, optimize processes, and heighten community security. The San Diego Sheriff’s Office opted for Mark43's CAD system for this initiative.

news.headline: First Insight and Boden strengthen partnership using AI for product decisions and pricing.
news.summary: A company based in Pittsburgh and London, Boden, is utilizing First Insight's AI-driven decision intelligence to incorporate consumer demand data into their product and pricing tactics. This partnership aims to enhance Boden's strategies by leveraging the power of artificial intelligence for making informed decisions based on consumer preferences.

news.headline: Helios Technologies' operating company partners with Alto-Shaam to drive innovation in commercial kitchen technology.
news.summary: A company under Helios Technologies (NYSE: HLIO) in Sarasota, Florida is leading innovation in commercial kitchen technology by partnering with Alto-Shaam.

news.headline: Trex expands mid-tier composite decking options with new Performance-Engineered™ boards. Strengthening with expansion of Trex Select® line.
news.summary: In Winchester, VA, Trex Company (NYSE:TREX) has been making waves in the composite decking industry by introducing new products that establish its dominance in both high-end and basic segments. As the top producer of wood-alternative decking and railing globally, Trex is set to further enhance its mid-range selection by expanding the Trex Select® line this spring. This move comes at a crucial time as decking demand rises, positioning the company strongly across all pricing tiers.

news.headline: Hasbro and Mattel partner for PLAY-DOH Barbie collection, inspiring kids to unleash creativity. Available at Target stores.
news.summary: In Pawtucket, Rhode Island, and El Segundo, California, Hasbro, Inc. (NASDAQ: HAS) and Mattel, Inc. (NASDAQ: MAT) revealed the introduction of a fresh PLAY-DOH Barbie series through Hasbro's recent licensing partnership with Mattel. This distinctive collection comprises various dolls equipped with exclusive fashion-designing instruments aiming to inspire children to unleash their creativity and design DOH-infused outfits. The PLAY-DOH Barbie line, distributed by Hasbro, will debut in Target stores.

news.headline: Giant Food and Divert, Inc. prevent 80M pounds of unsold food from being wasted since 2022.
news.summary: Giant Food and Divert, based in Landover, Md. and West Concord, Mass. respectively, have revealed a significant achievement in their partnership. They have successfully processed close to 80 million pounds of unsold food products since the beginning of 2022. This milestone highlights their commitment to reducing food waste and promoting sustainability in their operations.

news.headline: Lemon bottle hits milestone, selling 3M vials worldwide.
news.summary: In recent statistics released, it has been reported that the unemployment rate has decreased to 4.5%. Additionally, the stock market has seen a significant increase, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average rising by 500 points. This positive trend has been attributed to a boost in consumer spending and strong economic growth. On the other hand, inflation has risen by 2.3%, leading to concerns about its potential impact on the economy. Experts are optimistic about the overall outlook but suggest monitoring inflation closely in the coming months.

news.headline: AB Akola Group's CFO, Mažvydas Šileika, presented H1 unaudited results for 2024/2025 in webinar on Feb 20, 2025.
news.summary: AB Akola Group conducted a webinar on February 20, 2025, during which their CFO, Mažvydas Šileika, shared the financial performance for the first half of the 2024/2025 fiscal year.

news.headline: Sodexo focuses on improving Gen Z mental health on campuses with food engagement strategies based on research.
news.summary: In Bethesda, Md., Sodexo Campus is actively combating the mental health struggles faced by Gen Z students, who are experiencing some of the lowest levels in recent history. The company has honed in on utilizing food as the focal point to engage students and foster supportive communities for their overall well-being. Sodexo Campus bases its approach on data from its global insights team, the 'The Quad Squad’ - their in-house college research group comprising college students, and the extensive findings from the Sodexo Student Lifestyle Survey.

news.headline: Global Small Scale LNG Terminals market valued at $45.9 billion in 2024, projected to reach $64.2 billion by 2030 - growing at 5.8% CAGR. -ResearchAndMarkets.com
news.summary: A global report on Small Scale LNG Terminals has been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. The market was worth USD 45.9 Billion in 2024 and is anticipated to rise to USD 64.2 Billion by 2030, with a projected growth rate of 5.8% from 2024 to 2030. This detailed report offers insights into market dynamics, drivers, and future projections, aiding in strategic business planning.

news.headline: Chesapeake Utilities Corp. awarded 2025 Warrior Friendly Business by Delaware State Chamber of Commerce JMAC in Over 50 Employees category.
news.summary: In Dover, Delaware on February 20, 2025, Chesapeake Utilities Corporation, listed as CPK on the NYSE, received the prestigious title of a 2025 Warrior Friendly Business from the Delaware State Chamber of Commerce Joint Military Affairs Committee (JMAC). The company was specifically acknowledged in the Over 50 Employees division for this recognition.

news.headline: Tigo Energy to showcase software enhancements reducing system commissioning time by one hour at Intersolar 2025.
news.summary: In Campbell, California, Tigo Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: TYGO) will be presenting at Intersolar North America 2025. This leading provider of intelligent solar and energy software solutions is set to unveil software upgrades that can decrease system commissioning time by an average of one hour. Through the integration of these enhancements, there will be a reduction in manual processes, promoting installer self-reliance. Moreover, Tigo will be showcasing the accomplishments of EnergyAid, a top-rated solar maintenance and repair service provider, during the exhibition.

news.headline: Collision claims for battery electric vehicles rose over 30% last year, but average severity remained stable.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, in San Diego, Mitchell, a subsidiary of Enlyte and a prominent technology and information provider for the Property & Casualty (P&C) claims and Collision Repair sectors, unveiled its newest version of the Plugged-In: EV Collision Insights report. This release offers essential insights into electric vehicle collisions and their impact on the industry.

news.headline: DentaQuest donates $45,000 to GeriSmiles and The L.A. Trust in California to improve oral health for school-age children.
news.summary: GeriSmiles and The L.A. Trust are working together to improve oral health in underserved communities. A generous donation of $45,000 was made by DentaQuest, a part of Sun Life U.S., to support these nonprofits in their efforts. The goal is to help ensure that individuals in these communities have access to quality oral healthcare and hygiene resources. The contribution was announced on February 20, 2025, in Wellesley, Massachusetts.

news.headline: Quantum Speed Works chooses Uwharrie Motorsports Park for new location on 400-acre site in North Carolina.
news.summary: In Alton, Virginia on February 20, 2025, Quantum Speed Works, a renowned motorsports and high-performance automotive company, announced its choice of Uwharrie Motorsports Park & Resort. Situated in North Carolina, this top-tier motorsports facility covers an impressive 400 acres.

news.headline: RiskScout's new BSA/AML solution in Texas, launched on Feb. 20, 2025, is gaining popularity for its efficiency, cost savings, and compliance effectiveness among community banks and credit unions.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas on February 20, 2025, RiskScout introduced their new BSA/AML solution, which has quickly gained attention in the industry. Community banks and credit unions are reaping the benefits with increased efficiency, cost savings, and enhanced compliance. The positive impact is evident, with significant improvements reported in various areas. The solution's success is reflected in the numbers, as evidenced by a noticeable uptick in efficiency, cost reductions, and enhanced compliance measures.

news.headline: Lennox introduces SL22KLV Cold Climate Heat Pump to operate in extreme temperatures with low GWP refrigerant.
news.summary: Lennox Residential HVAC has introduced the Lennox SL22KLV Cold Climate Heat Pump, designed to provide precise comfort with a focus on reducing environmental impact. This heat pump stands out for its use of low global warming potential (GWP) refrigerant. The announcement was made in Richardson, Texas on February 20, 2025. Lennox Residential HVAC, known for its pioneering home comfort solutions, continues to lead the way in this sector.

news.headline: Cavallo enhances SalesPad Inventory Manager for better warehouse performance in Grand Rapids, with upgrades for efficiency and accuracy.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, in Grand Rapids, Michigan, Cavallo introduced major enhancements to its SalesPad Inventory Manager software to enhance warehouse operations. These upgrades aim to boost efficiency, accuracy, and scalability. The move underscores Cavallo's dedication to assisting in new processes and...

news.headline: TruHearing and SHOEBOX collaborate to improve hearing healthcare access; 80% of Americans haven't had their hearing tested.
news.summary: In Draper, Utah on February 20, 2025, TruHearing, the top market share holder in hearing health, has formed a collaboration with SHOEBOX, the leading provider of hearing screening and testing solutions. This partnership aims to address a significant gap in hearing healthcare services. Surprisingly, approximately 80% of Americans have yet to undergo hearing tests, highlighting the urgency and importance of initiatives like this collaboration.

news.headline: #paid introduces new job discovery experience for creators, offering brand collaborations. Leading influencer marketplace.
news.summary: A renowned creator marketing platform and influencer marketplace, #paid, unveiled a new job board on Feb 20, 2025. This innovative feature aims to provide creators with quality brand collaboration opportunities. The platform, based in New York and Toronto, empowers influencers by giving them control over job discovery. The job board opens up avenues for creators to explore various opportunities and take charge of their professional growth. #paid is committed to fostering meaningful collaborations and enhancing the creator experience in the digital space.

news.headline: Potbelly Corp. to open six new locations in Winston-Salem, NC area with franchise partnership.
news.summary: In Chicago on February 20, 2025, Potbelly Corporation (NASDAQ: PBPB) revealed its expansion plans in Winston-Salem, North Carolina. The company sealed a new Shop Development Agreement (SDA) with franchisees Dion and Keish Hilliard to introduce six new Potbelly stores in the Winston-Salem, Greensboro, and Burlington markets.

news.headline: Dividend 15 Split Corp. declares $0.10 monthly distribution for Class A ($1.20 yearly) & $0.05833 for Preferred ($0.70 yearly). Payable Mar 10 to shareholders as of Feb 28.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, Dividend 15 Split Corp. announced a monthly distribution for its shareholders. The Company declared a distribution of $0.10000 per Class A share, which amounts to $1.20 annually. For Preferred shares, the distribution is $0.05833 per share, totaling $0.700 annually. Shareholders as of February 28, 2025, will receive these distributions on March 10, 2025.

news.headline: Enviri Corporation (NYSE: NVRI) postpones conference call until 9:15 a.m. ET with new dial-in information.
news.summary: Enviri Corporation, a company listed on NYSE under the ticker symbol NVRI, has announced a delay in the scheduled conference call originally set for February 20, 2025. The call, now rescheduled for 9:15 a.m. Eastern Time, will feature updated dial-in details for participants.

news.headline: Sprout Social awarded for 9th year by G2, top in 7 categories based on customer reviews and satisfaction.
news.summary: Sprout Social has been recognized as a leading company across seven categories based on positive customer reviews and satisfaction.

news.headline: J.D. Power predicts 8.1% rise in new vehicle sales in February 2025, setting record consumer spending.
news.summary: In Troy, Michigan, according to J.D. Power forecasts, there is an anticipated 8.1% increase in new-vehicle retail sales. Additionally, consumer spending is expected to reach a new monthly high for February.

news.headline: LP Building Solutions receives industry honors: Trail Blazer Award from Beacon, Vendor of the Year from BMR and Lumbermen’s Inc.
news.summary: LP Building Solutions recently garnered three prestigious accolades within the industry, enhancing its status as a pioneering and reliable entity in the market. The company was bestowed with the Trail Blazer Award by Beacon, alongside being recognized as the 2024 Vendor of the Year by both BMR and Lumbermen’s Inc. LP's spokesperson emphasized that these achievements underscore the robust partnerships, superior product quality, and unwavering commitment of its team.

news.headline: Amazon is expanding its Buy with Prime service to include adidas.com and the adidas app, offering more choices to Prime members.
news.summary: In Seattle, Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) revealed the extension of its Buy with Prime feature, a direct-to-customer (DTC) service, to incorporate adidas.com and the adidas app in the near future. This move caters to numerous U.S.-based Prime members, offering them access to a wider array of popular brands beyond Amazon's platform. This service, part of the membership package, provides added selection, as well as savings, convenience, and entertainment. Through Buy with Prime, Prime members can now make purchases directly from thousands of options.

news.headline: Docutech, based in Idaho, wins 2025 HousingWire Tech100 Mortgage award for ninth year in a row. Continues to drive industry innovation.
news.summary: Docutech, a prominent provider of document, eSign, eClose, and print fulfillment technology and a part of the First American family of companies, was announced as a winner of the HousingWire Magazine 2025 Tech100 Mortgage award in Idaho Falls. This is the ninth consecutive year that the company has received this recognition. It highlights Docutech's dedication to advancing mortgage technology and fostering industry innovation. The award showcases Docutech's commitment to staying at the forefront of technological advancements within the mortgage sector.

news.headline: Triton Digital releases Jan 2025 U.S. Podcast Ranker, iHeart Audience earns #1 spot with 64.4M Avg Weekly Downloads.
news.summary: In a recent update from Triton Digital®, a leading provider in technology and services for digital audio and broadcast radio industries, the January 2025 reporting period (December 30, 2024 – February 2, 2025) U.S. Podcast Ranker has been unveiled. According to Triton's Podcast Metrics measurement service, iHeart Audience Network has clinched the #1 position on the Top Sales Networks Report for January. The network recorded impressive figures with 64.4 million Average Weekly Downloads and 18.1 million Average Weekly Streams.

news.headline: Roku CEO to discuss at Morgan Stanley conference on March 5 at 12:20 PM PT / 3:20 PM ET. Visit www.roku.com/investor for webcast.
news.summary: In San Jose, California, Roku, Inc. (Nasdaq: ROKU) has revealed that Anthony Wood, the Founder and CEO, is set to take part in a fireside chat during the 2025 Morgan Stanley Technology, Media and Telecom Conference on March 5. Mr. Wood is slated to speak at 12:20 PM PT / 3:20 PM ET. Individuals can view a live webcast and replay of the presentation through the investor relations section of the Roku website at www.roku.com/investor. Roku, Inc. led the way in TV streaming services.

news.headline: Moose Toys showcases thriving portfolio with hits like Bluey and MrBeast Lab at Toy Fair 2025 in LA.
news.summary: Leading toy manufacturer Moose Toys is showcasing their strong growth at the North American International Toy Fair® with a portfolio that includes popular products like Bluey and MrBeast Lab. The company, known for its unmatched product innovation, is rapidly expanding its offerings. As of February 20, 2025, they are solidifying their presence in the market with a diverse range of toys, attracting a large audience at the event.

news.headline: DataTrace honored as top real estate tech company by HousingWire for fifth year in a row, showcasing innovation.
news.summary: A company based in Agoura Hills, California, DataTrace®, has been acknowledged as a 2025 Tech100™ Real Estate winner by HousingWire. This marks the fifth consecutive year that DataTrace has received this accolade. Specializing in data and automation solutions for the title and settlement services sector, DataTrace has demonstrated a consistent dedication to assisting clients in enhancing efficiency. This recognition underscores DataTrace's position as a top innovator in real estate technology.
